revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:姫神社]]
__NOTOC__ {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = '''Hime Shrine''' (姫神社) |image = File:IMG aiko.JPG |religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}} |location = {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|en|Nagasaki Prefecture|qid=Q169376|lt=Nagasaki Prefecture|1=Nagasaki Prefecture}}{{ill|Minami-Matsuura District, Nagasaki|en|Minami-Matsuura District, Nagasaki|qid=Q1156377|lt=Minamimatsuura District|1=Minami-Matsuura District, Nagasaki}}{{ill|Shin-Kamigotō|en|Shin-Kamigotō|qid=Q1206790|lt=Shin Kamigoto Town|1=Shin-Kamigotō}}{{ill|Aikagou|ja|相河郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aikagou|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 上五島町|1=Kamigotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11358430}}{{small|{{ill|Aza|ja|小字|lt=Aza|lt_ja=字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aza|1=koaza|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5327509}}}}{{ill|Hahanoue|ja|破波ノ上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hahanoue|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 上五島町|1=Kamigotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11358430}}168 |coordinates = {{Coord|32.977333333333334|N|129.05902777777777|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Tagiribime|ja|タギリビメ|lt=Tagorihime no Mikoto|lt_ja=田意比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagiribime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ|1=Tagorihime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10932870}} |religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}} |type = Former Mukeshinsha |founded = Unknown |main_hall = |alternative_name = |inscriptions = |festival = October 29 |ritual = Kamigoto Kagura (Grand Festival) |map = {{location map|Japan Nagasaki Prefecture|label=Hime Shrine (姫神社)|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} |location = {{ill|Shinkamigoto|qid=Q1206790|1=Shin-Kamigotō}} }}
'''Hime Shrine''' (姫神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|en|Nagasaki Prefecture|qid=Q169376|lt=Nagasaki Prefecture|1=Nagasaki Prefecture}}, {{ill|Minami-Matsuura District, Nagasaki|en|Minami-Matsuura District, Nagasaki|qid=Q1156377|lt=Minamimatsuura District|1=Minami-Matsuura District, Nagasaki}}, {{ill|Shin-Kamigotō|en|Shin-Kamigotō|qid=Q1206790|lt=Shin Kamigoto Town|1=Shin-Kamigotō}}, {{ill|Aikagou|ja|相河郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aikagou|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 上五島町|1=Kamigotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11358430}}<ref>It belonged to the former {{ill|Aokata Village|ja|青方村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aokata Village|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青方町|1=Aokata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q48519169}} ({{ill|Aokata Area|ja|青方町|lt=Aokata Area|lt_ja=青方地区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aokata Area|1=Aokata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q48519169}}) of {{ill|Kamigoto Town|ja|上五島町#地名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamigoto Town|1=Kamigotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11358430}} in {{ill|Minami-Matsuura District, Nagasaki|en|Minami-Matsuura District, Nagasaki|qid=Q1156377|lt=Minamimatsuura District|1=Minami-Matsuura District, Nagasaki}}.</ref>.
== Deity == The principal deity enshrined is {{ill|Tagiribime|ja|タギリビメ|lt=Tagorihime no Mikoto|lt_ja=田意比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagiribime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ|1=Tagorihime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10932870}}.
=== Subsidiary Shrines === [[File:IMG_aiko2.JPG|180px|thumb|Subsidiary Shrines]] * {{ill|Yasaka Shrine|ja|八坂神社 (曖昧さ回避)|lt=Yasaka Shrine|lt_ja=八坂神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasaka Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Mountain Shrine|ja|山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mountain Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Inari shrine|en|Inari shrine|qid=Q514480|lt=Inari Shrine|1=Inari shrine}}
== History == [[File:IMG_aiko1.JPG|180px|thumb|Shrine Building]] The date of foundation is unknown. Originally, the shrine was enshrined in Akasaki, adjacent to {{ill|Aokata|ja|青方郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aokata|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 上五島町|1=Kamigotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11358430}}. In ancient times, {{ill|Aokata Port|ja|青方港|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aokata Port|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was used as a wind-waiting port for the ships of the {{ill|Japanese missions to Tang China|en|Japanese missions to Tang China|qid=Q262529|lt=Tang Envoy|1=Japanese missions to Tang China}}, and it is said that the voyagers prayed for safe passage at this shrine, offering a bronze mirror and a tachi.
In Tenpō 4 (1833), a request was made to enshrine it as the guardian deity of {{ill|Aikagou|ja|相河郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aikagou|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 上五島町|1=Kamigotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11358430}}, and in Tenpō 6 (1835) a treasure hall and a worship hall were constructed at the present site. In Tenpō 7 (1836), a shrine relocation festival was held in March. In Kaei 2 (1849), Yasaka Shrine was invoked to expel an epidemic. In Meiji 4 (1871), it became a Mukeshinsha, and in Meiji 44 (1911) a Mountain Shrine within the district was enshrined together.
== Rites == During the Gion Festival and the November 24–25 festival, {{ill|Kamigoto Kagura|ja|上五島神楽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamigoto Kagura|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is offered. Kamigoto Kagura is included within {{ill|Gotō Kagura|ja|五島神楽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gotō Kagura|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, which has been selected as a national Selected Intangible Folk Cultural Property and has been separately designated as an intangible folk cultural property by Nagasaki Prefecture.
; Main Festivals and Rituals * {{ill|Gion Matsuri|en|Gion Matsuri|qid=Q979873|lt=Gion Festival|1=Gion Matsuri}} (July 15) * {{ill|Grand Festival|ja|例大祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Grand Festival|ja_comment=fixed the redirect|1=Reisai|2=ja|3=例祭|4=fr|5=Reisai|lt=Reitaisai}} (October 29–30) {{-}}
== Other Shrines == Among the other shrines in Aikagou, there is a '''Mountain Shrine'''.
Also, in the adjacent {{ill|Aokata|ja|青方郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aokata|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 上五島町|1=Kamigotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11358430}}, there is '''{{ill|Aokata Shrine|ja|青方神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aokata Shrine|1=Aokata Shrine (Shinkamigoto)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11661448}}''', and in {{ill|Mikkanoura|ja|三日ノ浦郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikkanoura|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 上五島町|1=Kamigotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11358430}} there is '''{{ill|Kotohira shrines|lt=Kotohira shrines|lt=Kotohira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅神社 (新上五島町三日ノ浦郷)|lt=Kotohira shrines|lt=Kotohira Shrine|lt_ja=金刀比羅神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotohira Shrine|qq=}}'''.
<gallery> File:Aokata-jinjya1.JPG|Aokata Shrine ({{ill|Aokata|ja|青方郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aokata|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 上五島町}}) File:IMG_mika.JPG|Kotohira Shrine ({{ill|Mikkanoura|ja|三日ノ浦郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikkanoura|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 上五島町}}) </gallery>
== Bibliography == * 『{{ill|Kamigoto Town|ja|上五島町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamigoto Town|1=Kamigotō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11358430}} Local History, Heisei 16』, Kamigoto Town Board of Education * 『In Search of Kamigoto Town's Cultural Heritage』, Kamigoto Town Board of Education, Heisei 3 * 『Gotō Shrine Chronicle, Shōwa 18 (Reprint)』, Shinto Association of Minamimatsuura District
== References == {{Reflist}}
